label: Causal representation learning

node.label: Causal representation learning
node.definition: Representations aim to recover stable causal factors and mechanisms rather than only predictive correlations.
node.why_it_matters: In this atlas graph, Causal representation learning is modeled as depending on Causal inference, Latent variables & hidden state and feeding downstream nodes such as Scientific ML, simulators & digital twins, Medical imaging & clinical decision support.
examples: atlas downstream link to Scientific ML, simulators & digital twins
atlas downstream link to Medical imaging & clinical decision support
limitations: The chosen learning signal and interaction pattern may not match the deployment objective or data-generating process. Its direct dependencies include Causal inference, Latent variables & hidden state.

dependencies.rationale: In this atlas graph, Causal representation learning has a `uses` dependency on Causal inference because Causal inference is modeled as a reusable ingredient for the node.

In this atlas graph, Causal representation learning has a `uses` dependency on Latent variables & hidden state because Latent variables & hidden state is modeled as a reusable ingredient for the node.
In this atlas graph, Causal representation learning has a `trained_under` dependency on Supervised learning with `common` strength.
In this atlas graph, Causal representation learning has a `trained_under` dependency on Unsupervised learning with `common` strength.
